jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Fortis Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Fortis Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Fortis Healthcare:
Fortis Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare!
